zh.Hempsted, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾普斯泰德
zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Guilford於大約1499年與Walter Larkin在英國諾廷加姆爾格坦結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1540年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾普斯泰德。

zh-hans.Hempsted, Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾普斯泰德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Guilford于大约1499年与Walter Larkin在英国諾廷加姆爾格坦结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1540年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾普斯泰德。

nameMeanings.name: Guilford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Guildford in Surrey, which is probably named with Old English gylde ‘golden’ (perhaps used here to denote a sandy hill) + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Guilford married Walter Larkin about 1499, in Gotham, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1540, in Hempsted, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Guilford a épousé Walter Larkin environ 1499, à Gotham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1540, à Hempsted, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Guilford hat um 1499 in Gotham, Nottinghamshire, England Walter Larkin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1540 in Hempsted, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Guilford lei sposato Walter Larkin circa 1499, nel Gotham, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1540, nel Hempsted, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Guilfordは約1499年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアゴサムでWalter Larkinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1540年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアヘンプステドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Guilford(은)는 대략 1499년 영국 노틴그함실르 가섬에서 Walter Larkin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 헤프스테드에서 사망했다.

mn.Hempsted, Gloucestershire, England: Hempsted, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Guilford casou-se com Walter Larkin aproximadamente 1499, em Gotham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1540, em Hempsted, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Guilford вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Larkin около 1499 г. в местности готам, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1540 г. в местности хемпстед, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Guilford se casó con Walter Larkin aproximadamente 1499, en Gotham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1540, en Hempsted, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
